                                        <h2>How We Are Different</h2>

						<div class="l-blurb__col list-item-column blurb_column  col-12 col-sm-6 col-md-4 "><article class="icon_image_small blurb js-blurb blurb--default_column_style "><div class='blurb__image-wrap blurb__image-wrap--icon_image_small'><img width="100" height="100" src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20100%20100'%3E%3C/svg%3E" class="blurb__image" alt="Age-Specific Care" data-lazy-src="https://www.sandstonecare.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/10/1469415_Icons_AgeSpecificCare_093022.svg" /><noscript><img width="100" height="100" src="https://www.sandstonecare.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/10/1469415_Icons_AgeSpecificCare_093022.svg" class="blurb__image" alt="Age-Specific Care" /></noscript></div><h5 class='blurb__title'>Age-Specific Care</h5><div class='blurb__content'><p>We are age-specific, not gender-specific. We focus on the unique circumstances that you face at your specific stage of life.</p>
</div></article><article class="icon_image_small blurb js-blurb blurb--default_column_style "><div class='blurb__image-wrap blurb__image-wrap--icon_image_small'><img width="100" height="100" src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20100%20100'%3E%3C/svg%3E" class="blurb__image" alt="Evidence-Based Therapy" data-lazy-src="https://www.sandstonecare.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/10/1469415_Icons_EvidenceBasedTherapy_093022.svg" /><noscript><img width="100" height="100" src="https://www.sandstonecare.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/10/1469415_Icons_EvidenceBasedTherapy_093022.svg" class="blurb__image" alt="Evidence-Based Therapy" /></noscript></div><h5 class='blurb__title'>Evidence-Based Therapy</h5><div class='blurb__content'><p>We only use treatment interventions that have been scientifically proven to provide consistent, lasting recovery.</p>
</div></article><article class="icon_image_small blurb js-blurb blurb--default_column_style "><div class='blurb__image-wrap blurb__image-wrap--icon_image_small'><img width="100" height="100" src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20100%20100'%3E%3C/svg%3E" class="blurb__image" alt="Small Group Sizes" data-lazy-src="https://www.sandstonecare.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/10/1469415_Icons_SmallyGroupSizes_093022.svg" /><noscript><img width="100" height="100" src="https://www.sandstonecare.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/10/1469415_Icons_SmallyGroupSizes_093022.svg" class="blurb__image" alt="Small Group Sizes" /></noscript></div><h5 class='blurb__title'>Small Group Sizes</h5><div class='blurb__content'><p>You are more than a number, which is why we provide an intimate setting where your voice can be heard.</p>
</div></article></div><div class="l-blurb__col list-item-column blurb_column  col-12 col-sm-6 col-md-4 "><article class="icon_image_small blurb js-blurb blurb--default_column_style "><div class='blurb__image-wrap blurb__image-wrap--icon_image_small'><img width="100" height="100" src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20100%20100'%3E%3C/svg%3E" class="blurb__image" alt="Individualized Treatment Plans" data-lazy-src="https://www.sandstonecare.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/10/1469415_Icons_IndividualizedTreatmentPlan_093022.svg" /><noscript><img width="100" height="100" src="https://www.sandstonecare.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/10/1469415_Icons_IndividualizedTreatmentPlan_093022.svg" class="blurb__image" alt="Individualized Treatment Plans" /></noscript></div><h5 class='blurb__title'>Individualized Treatment Plans</h5><div class='blurb__content'><p>No one person is the same, and neither is their recovery journey. class="l-image-text__col l-image-text__col--text list-item-column col-12 col-lg-6 order-2 order-lg-1"><div class="image-text__content"><h2>Your Teen Deserves Treatment That Works</h2>
<p>You may have felt helpless watching your teen lose the ability to enjoy things like they used to. Something needs to change<em>, </em>but it can seem like everything you try to do to reach them only makes things worse.</p>
<p>In a recent study, our clients who completed treatment reported a 48% decrease in anxiety symptoms and a 63% decrease in symptoms of depression.</p>
<p>At Sandstone Care, we understand that sending your child to a residential treatment center is not something done on a whim. Which is why we track our outcomes closely, so you can feel confident that treatment is not just a shot in the dark, it’s an evidence-based, proven step towards a better life.</p>
<p><a class="btn-primary" href="/treatment-outcomes/">Read Full Treatment Outcomes</a></p>
</div></div></div>                </div>

        </div>
    </section><section  id="gutenblock-block_acf-block-698f3e43b385f" class="gutenblock js-gutenblock gutenblock--oms-faqs bg-color-blue_light angle_right hide_mountain">

        <div  class="gutenblock__inner">

            <div  class="container-fluid">
                

    <div class="row gutenblock-header justify-content-center">
        <div class="col-12 col-sm-10 col-lg-8 l-gutenblock-header__col">
            <div class="gutenblock-header__content text-center">
                <h2>Why Age-Specific Care?</h2>
<p style="text-align: left;">As we grow and change, our ways of handling addiction and mental health challenges change, too. Our treatment philosophy acknowledges this and leverages it to achieve effective treatment for everyone.</p>
<p style="text-align: left;">Whether you’re the parent of a teen who needs treatment, a young adult exploring outpatient options, or an adult in need of detox, you’re guaranteed to find what you need at one of our facilities. Explore our age-specific treatment below.</p>
<p> </p>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>


<!--                <div class="row expand_collapse_row">-->
<!--                    <div class="expand_collapse_all_container">-->
<!--                        <span class="collapse_all">Collapse All</span>-->
<!--                        <span class="expand_all">Expand All</span>-->
<!--                    </div>-->
<!--                </div>-->
                <div class="row faq_row justify-content-center">
                    <div class="faq_column col-12 col-lg-8">

                        
                            <div class="faq_container">
                                <div class="faq_container_inner">
                                    <button type="button" class="faq_question" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="sect-1" id="accordion-1-id">
                                        <h3 class="faq_title">Rehab for Teens: Teen Alcohol Rehab, Drug Rehab, & Mental Health Treatment</h3>
                                        <span class="faq_trigger"></span>
                                    </button>
                                    <div id="sect-1" role="region" aria-labelledby="accordion-1-id" class="faq_answer">
                                        <p>Being the parent of a teenager who struggles with substance use or mental health issues can be frightening. Many parents feel helpless and don’t know where to turn. If your teen is using drugs or alcohol or showing signs of mental illnesses, it might be time to consider treatment.</p>
<p>At Sandstone Care, we offer comprehensive mental health and substance use treatment for teens through our continuum of care that meets your teen where they are. And all of our teen programming offers academic support to make sure they stay on top of their schooling during treatment.</p>
<p>If you’re ready to find your teen the treatment they need, trust Sandstone Care to help your teen navigate their mental health struggles and overcome substance use disorder.</p>
<p>Explore the different <a href="https://www.sandstonecare.com/teens/levels-of-care/">levels of care for teens</a> offered at Sandstone Care.</p>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                                                    
                            <div class="faq_container">
                                <div class="faq_container_inner">
                                    <button type="button" class="faq_question" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="sect-2" id="accordion-2-id">
                                        <h3 class="faq_title">Rehab For Young Adults: Mental Health & Substance Use Programming</h3>
                                        <span class="faq_trigger"></span>
                                    </button>
                                    <div id="sect-2" role="region" aria-labelledby="accordion-2-id" class="faq_answer">
                                        <p>Young adults face critical life transitions, such as moving from high school to college, entering the workforce, or becoming parents. For those dealing with mental health or substance use issues, these changes can be especially challenging. And for many young adults, fear of judgment can make seeking treatment feel out of the question.</p>
<p>At Sandstone Care’s young adult rehab facilities, you’ll meet peers who know exactly what you’re going through and can support you. Whether you need detox or outpatient treatment, our continuum of care will meet you wherever you are in the recovery journey.</p>
<p>Don’t let the challenges of adulthood or fear of judgment stand in the way of your sobriety and mental health. Let our programming help you build a happier, healthier future.</p>
<p>Explore the different <a href="https://www.sandstonecare.com/young-adults/levels-of-care/">levels of care for young adults</a> offered at Sandstone Care.</p>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                                                    
                            <div class="faq_container">
                                <div class="faq_container_inner">
                                    <button type="button" class="faq_question" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="sect-3" id="accordion-3-id">
                                        <h3 class="faq_title">Adult Treatment Centers: Drug & Alcohol Detox</h3>
                                        <span class="faq_trigger"></span>
                                    </button>
                                    <div id="sect-3" role="region" aria-labelledby="accordion-3-id" class="faq_answer">
                                        <p>Between work commitments and family responsibilities, it’s easy to feel like you don’t have the time to take care of yourself, let alone address your substance use. Whether you are nervous about stepping into detox or wondering, “How can I find a drug rehab for adults near me?”, Sandstone Care is here to help.</p>
<p>With individualized treatment programs, small program sizes, and dual diagnosis treatments, your detox journey will make sure you are empowered to reclaim every part of your life. Our evidence-based methods will help you to battle your addiction, improve your mental health, and heal strained relationships with your loved ones.</p>
<p>It’s time to get back on your feet. From the moment you step through our doors, our skilled team is dedicated to supporting you, extending our assistance through every stage—from intake to aftercare.</p>
<p>Explore our <a href="https://www.sandstonecare.com/adults/levels-of-care/">adult levels of care</a> today.</p>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>

class="intro-text">5-21 days of 24/7 on-site medical supervision.</p>
<p>Our Medically-Assisted Detox and Inpatient Center offers private rooms and 24/7 medically supervised care to support a safe recovery from drugs and alcohol, followed by comprehensive treatment that addresses your physical, psychological, emotional, and spiritual needs.</p>

>Residential Treatment</h5><div class='row align-items-center justify-content-between'><div class='col-12 col-md-6 col-xl-5  text_column '><p class="intro-text">30-45 days of on-site 24/7 treatment.</p>
<p>We provide residential treatment centers (RTCs) for teens 13-17 (18 in MD if still in high school) and young adults 18-35, treating mental health challenges including anxiety, depression, trauma, and substance use.</p>
<p>Our teen RTCs treat adolescents in a serene setting with smaller group sizes and a focus on strengthening the family unit. The length of stay is 30-45 days. Our young adult RTC offers young adults a peaceful environment in which they can be treated for mental health challenges. Both RTCs create a distraction-free space for healing, helping clients return to daily life feeling more balanced and well.</p>
</div><div class='col-12 col-md-6  video_column mt-4 mt-md-0'>

<p>Our Teen & Young Adult Day Treatment program, also known as Partial Hospitalization Program (PHP), is a highly structured level of care that offers five days of robust programming a week.</p>
<p>Our mental health and substance use programming helps clients to stabilize, begin to understand their mental health and/or addiction struggles, and heal from them. We strive to help our clients become more like the person they want to be, without using negative coping strategies or substances to get there.</p>

class='link-container__title' >Intensive Outpatient (IOP)</h5><div class='row align-items-center justify-content-between'><div class='col-12 col-md-6 col-xl-5  text_column '><p class="intro-text">12 weeks of on-site or virtual treatment.</p>
<p>Our Teen & Young Adult IOP, or Intensive Outpatient Program, consists of 3-4 days of weekly programming that treats mental health challenges such as depression, trauma, anxiety, and substance use.</p>
<p>IOP includes individual therapy, group therapy, and family therapy. This flexible treatment option occurs in the evening hours so you can continue meeting your school or work responsibilities while receiving care.</p>
</div><div class='col-12 col-md-6  video_column mt-4 mt-md-0'>

						<div class="l-blurb__col list-item-column blurb_column  col-12 col-sm-6 col-md-4 "><article class="icon_image_small blurb js-blurb blurb--default_column_style "><div class='blurb__image-wrap blurb__image-wrap--icon_image_small'><img width="100" height="100" src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20100%20100'%3E%3C/svg%3E" class="blurb__image" alt="No caption generated" data-lazy-src="https://www.sandstonecare.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/10/1469415_Icons_DepressionTreatment_100522.svg" /><noscript><img width="100" height="100" src="https://www.sandstonecare.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/10/1469415_Icons_DepressionTreatment_100522.svg" class="blurb__image" alt="No caption generated" /></noscript></div><h5 class='blurb__title'>Depression Treatment</h5><div class='blurb__content'><p>Depression is more than just feeling down for a few days — symptoms are long lasting and can affect you in many ways.</p>
</div></article><article class="icon_image_small blurb js-blurb blurb--default_column_style "><div class='blurb__image-wrap blurb__image-wrap--icon_image_small'><img width="100" height="100" src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20100%20100'%3E%3C/svg%3E" class="blurb__image" alt="No caption generated" data-lazy-src="https://www.sandstonecare.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/10/1469415_Icons_DHDBorderlinePersonality_100522.svg" /><noscript><img width="100" height="100" src="https://www.sandstonecare.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/10/1469415_Icons_DHDBorderlinePersonality_100522.svg" class="blurb__image" alt="No caption generated" /></noscript></div><h5 class='blurb__title'>Anxiety & Bi-Polar Treatment</h5><div class='blurb__content'><p>Anxiety disorders are thought patterns of fear, dread, and uneasiness that affect other aspects of your life.</p>
</div></article></div><div class="l-blurb__col list-item-column blurb_column  col-12 col-sm-6 col-md-4 "><article class="icon_image_small blurb js-blurb blurb--default_column_style "><div class='blurb__image-wrap blurb__image-wrap--icon_image_small'><img width="100" height="100" src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20100%20100'%3E%3C/svg%3E" class="blurb__image" alt="No caption generated" data-lazy-src="https://www.sandstonecare.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/10/1469415_Icons_TraumaPTSDTreatment_100522-1.svg" /><noscript><img width="100" height="100" src="https://www.sandstonecare.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/10/1469415_Icons_TraumaPTSDTreatment_100522-1.svg" class="blurb__image" alt="No caption generated" /></noscript></div><h5 class='blurb__title'>Trauma & PTSD Treatment</h5><div class='blurb__content'><p>Trauma is the emotional response to a specific event like an accident, sexual abuse, or a natural disaster.</p>
</div></article><article class="icon_image_small blurb js-blurb blurb--default_column_style "><div class='blurb__image-wrap blurb__image-wrap--icon_image_small'><img width="100" height="100" src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20100%20100'%3E%3C/svg%3E" class="blurb__image" alt="A circle maze" data-lazy-src="https://www.sandstonecare.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/10/1469415_Icons_DHDBorderlinePersonality_02_100522.svg" /><noscript><img width="100" height="100" src="https://www.sandstonecare.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/10/1469415_Icons_DHDBorderlinePersonality_02_100522.svg" class="blurb__image" alt="A circle maze" /></noscript></div><h5 class='blurb__title'> ADHD & Borderline Personality Disorder Treatment</h5><div class='blurb__content'><p>ADHD is marked by difficulty focusing, controlling impulsive behaviors, and over-activity.</p>

<script>
const url = new URL(window.location.href);
const params = url.searchParams;

// Normalize params to lowercase
const normalized = {};
for (const [key, value] of params.entries()) {
	normalized[key.toLowerCase()] = value;
}

const paramDefs = [
	{ name: 'gad_source', label: 'GAD Source' },
	{ name: 'gad_campaignid', label: 'GAD Campaign ID' },
	{ name: 'gbraid', label: 'GBRAID' },
	{ name: 'gclid', label: 'GCLID' },
	{ name: 'utm_source', label: 'UTM Source' },
	{ name: 'utm_medium', label: 'UTM Medium' },
	{ name: 'utm_campaign', label: 'UTM Campaign' },
	{ name: 'utm_content', label: 'UTM Content' },
	{ name: 'msclkid', label: 'MS Click ID' },
];

const queryData = paramDefs
	.filter(def => normalized[def.name] !== undefined)
	.map(def => ({
		name: def.name,
		label: def.label,
		type: 'string',
		data: normalized[def.name]
	}));

// Inject into Talkative config
window.talkativeCustomConfig = {
	events: {
		enterStandby() {
			if (window.talkativeApi?.interactionData && queryData.length > 0) {
				window.talkativeApi.interactionData.appendInteractionData(queryData);
			}
		}
	}
};

import(`https://us.engage.app/api/ecs/v1/loader/a9b2f753-a85e-4356-be2a-746e023b3b81.js?path=${encodeURIComponent(window.location.origin+window.location.pathname)}`)
</script>

<script type="rocketlazyloadscript" data-rocket-type="text/javascript">
function handleCheckboxChange() {
    const checkbox = document.querySelector('.sms_input input');
    const fieldValue = document.querySelector('.sms_field_value input');
    if (checkbox && fieldValue) {
        fieldValue.value = checkbox.checked ? 'true' : 'false';
    }
}

function initializeCheckboxHandler() {
    const checkbox = document.querySelector('.sms_input input');
    if (checkbox) {
        checkbox.addEventListener('change', handleCheckboxChange);
        handleCheckboxChange();
    }
}

function observeFormChanges() {
    const observer = new MutationObserver(() => {
        initializeCheckboxHandler();
    });
    const form = document.querySelector('form');
    if (form) {
        observer.observe(form, { childList: true, subtree: true });
    }
}

initializeCheckboxHandler();
observeFormChanges();

</script>

<script type="rocketlazyloadscript" data-rocket-type="text/javascript">
function getParameterByName(name, url = window.location.href) {
	name = name.replace(/[\[\]]/g, '\\$&');
	var regex = new RegExp('[?&]' + name + '(=([^&#]*)|&|#|$)');
	var results = regex.exec(url);
	if (!results) return null;
	if (!results[2]) return '';
	return decodeURIComponent(results[2].replace(/\+/g, ' '));
}

function setCookie(name, value, days) {
	let expires = "";
	if (days) {
		let date = new Date();
		date.setTime(date.getTime() + days * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000);
		expires = "; expires=" + date.toUTCString();
	}
	document.cookie = name + "=" + (value || "") + expires + "; path=/";
}

function getCookie(name) {
	let nameEQ = name + "=";
	let ca = document.cookie.split(';');
	for (let i = 0; i < ca.length; i++) {
		let c = ca[i].trim();
		if (c.indexOf(nameEQ) === 0) return c.substring(nameEQ.length, c.length);
	}
	return null;
}

function getUTMParameterOrCookie(paramName) {
	let paramValue = getParameterByName(paramName);
	if (paramValue) {
		setCookie(paramName, paramValue, 30); // Save in cookie for 30 days
	} else {
		paramValue = getCookie(paramName); // Get from cookie if not in URL
	}
	return paramValue;
}

function getTrafficSource() {
	var lookupTable = {
		"pinterest / cpc": "Pinterest Paid",
		"pinterest.com / referral": "Pinterest Organic",
		"google / cpc": "Google Adwords",
		"bing / cpc": "Bing Paid",
		"facebook / cpc": "Facebook Paid",
		"youtube.com / referral": "YouTube",
		"search.yahoo.com / referral": "Yahoo Organic",
		"GMBlisting / organic": "Organic Maps",
		"google.com / referral": "Google Organic",
		"psychologytoday.com / referral": "Psychology Today",
		"bing.com / referral": "Bing Organic",
		"facebook.com / banner": "Facebook",
		"m.facebook.com / referral": "Facebook",
		"facebook.com / referral": "Facebook",
		"l.facebook.com / referral": "Facebook",
		"lm.facebook.com / referral": "Facebook",
	};

	function determineTrafficSource() {
		var gclid = getUTMParameterOrCookie('gclid'); // Check gclid in URL or cookies
		var msclkid = getUTMParameterOrCookie('msclkid'); // Check msclkid in URL or cookies
		var utm_source = getUTMParameterOrCookie('utm_source');
		var utm_medium = getUTMParameterOrCookie('utm_medium');
		var referral = document.referrer;

		// If gclid exists, the traffic source is Google Adwords
		if (gclid) {
			return "Google Adwords";
		}

		var sourceKey = "";

		if (msclkid) {
			sourceKey = "bing / cpc";
		} else if (utm_source === "pinterest") {
			sourceKey = "pinterest / cpc";
		} else if (utm_source && utm_medium) {
			sourceKey = utm_source + " / " + utm_medium;
		} else if (utm_medium === "facebook") {
			sourceKey = "facebook / cpc";
		} else if (referral) {
			var referrerDomain = referral.split('/')[2].replace(/^www\./, '');
			sourceKey = referrerDomain + " / referral";
		} else {
			sourceKey = "";
		}

		return lookupTable[sourceKey] || "Website";
	}

	function getStoredTrafficSource() {
		var cookieMatch = getCookie('trafficSource');
		if (cookieMatch) {
			try {
				// Декодируем строку перед парсингом
				var storedSource = JSON.parse(decodeURIComponent(cookieMatch));
				return storedSource.source;
			} catch (error) {
				console.error("Error parsing trafficSource cookie:", error);
				return null;
			}
		}
		return null;
	}

	var detectedSource = determineTrafficSource();
	var storedSource = getStoredTrafficSource();

	// Update cookies if any UTM parameters or traffic source changes
	var sourceString = JSON.stringify({ source: detectedSource });
	if (storedSource !== detectedSource) {
		setCookie("trafficSource", sourceString, 90);
	}

	return detectedSource;
}

// Example usage
var trafficSource = getTrafficSource();
console.log("Traffic Source:", trafficSource);

// Function to handle GCLID
function handleGclid() {
	let gclid = getUTMParameterOrCookie('gclid');
	const forms = document.querySelectorAll('form');

	forms.forEach((form) => {
		const gclidField = form.querySelector('.GCLID input');
		if (gclidField) gclidField.value = gclid;
	});

	console.log("Handled GCLID:", gclid);
}

// Call handleGclid if traffic source is Google Adwords
if (trafficSource === "Google Adwords") {
	handleGclid();
}



// Fill UTM fields in forms
function fillFieldsInForms() {
	
	var utm_source = getUTMParameterOrCookie('utm_source');
	var utm_medium = getUTMParameterOrCookie('utm_medium');
	var utm_campaign = getUTMParameterOrCookie('utm_campaign');
	var utm_content = getUTMParameterOrCookie('utm_content');

	const forms = document.querySelectorAll('form');
	forms.forEach((form) => {
		const utmSrcField = form.querySelector('.SRC input');
		if (utmSrcField) utmSrcField.value = trafficSource;
		
		const utmSourceField = form.querySelector('.utm_source input');
		if (utmSourceField) utmSourceField.value = utm_source;

		const utmMediumField = form.querySelector('.utm_medium input');
		if (utmMediumField) utmMediumField.value = utm_medium;

		const utmCampaignField = form.querySelector('.utm_campaign input');
		if (utmCampaignField) utmCampaignField.value = utm_campaign;

		const utmContentField = form.querySelector('.utm_content input');
		if (utmContentField) utmContentField.value = utm_content;
	});

	// Log all UTM parameters and GCLID
	console.log("UTM Source:", utm_source);
	console.log("UTM Medium:", utm_medium);
	console.log("UTM Campaign:", utm_campaign);
	console.log("UTM Content:", utm_content);
	console.log("GCLID:", getUTMParameterOrCookie('gclid'));
}

fillFieldsInForms();

</script>
<!-- end Simple Custom CSS and JS -->

<script type="rocketlazyloadscript" data-rocket-type="text/javascript">
const links = document.querySelectorAll('.block_anchor_link');

if (links.length > 0) {
	links.forEach(link => {
		link.addEventListener('click', function (event) {
			event.preventDefault();
			event.stopImmediatePropagation();

			const blockRefId = this.getAttribute('data-block_ref_id');
			if (blockRefId) {
				const allLinks = document.querySelectorAll('.block_anchor_link');
				allLinks.forEach(item => {
					item.classList.remove('active');
				});
				
				this.classList.add('active');
				const targetElement = document.querySelector(blockRefId);
				if (targetElement) {
					const heading = targetElement.querySelector('h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6');
					const scrollTarget = heading || targetElement;
	
					const targetPosition = scrollTarget.getBoundingClientRect().top + window.scrollY;

					let offset = 145;

					if(window.matchMedia('(max-width: 768px)').matches) {
						offset = 170;
					}

					//console.log(offset);

					window.scrollTo({
						top: targetPosition - offset,
						behavior: 'smooth'
					});
					document.querySelector('#jumplink-nav').classList.remove('show');
					document.querySelector('#post-nav-trigger').classList.remove('open');
				}
			}
		});
	});
}


(() => {
	const menuItems = document.querySelectorAll(".footer-menu-accordeon .menu-item-has-children > a");

	menuItems.forEach(link => {
		link.addEventListener("click", function (e) {
			e.preventDefault(); 

			const parentItem = this.parentElement;

// 			document.querySelectorAll(".footer-menu-accordeon .menu-item-has-children").forEach(item => {
// 				if (item !== parentItem) {
// 					item.classList.remove("open");
// 				}
// 			});

			parentItem.classList.toggle("open");
		});
	});
})();

</script>

<script type="rocketlazyloadscript" data-rocket-type="text/javascript">
(() => {
	     function loadScriptWhenInView(entries, observer) {
        entries.forEach(entry => {
            if (entry.isIntersecting) {
                let scriptTag = entry.target.querySelector('script[data-src]');
                if (scriptTag) {
                    // Move data-src to src to load the script
                    let dataSrc = scriptTag.getAttribute('data-src');
                    scriptTag.setAttribute('src', dataSrc);
                    scriptTag.removeAttribute('data-src');
                    
                    // Optionally, stop observing once the script is loaded
                    observer.unobserve(entry.target);
                }
            }
        });
    }

    // Create an IntersectionObserver
    let observer = new IntersectionObserver(loadScriptWhenInView, {
        root: null, // Use the viewport as root
        rootMargin: '200px 0px', // Trigger 200px before the element enters the viewport
        threshold: 0 // Trigger as soon as any part of the element is in view
    });

    // Target the container block with class 'form-columns__form-wrap'
    let targetBlocks = document.querySelectorAll('.form-columns__form-wrap');
    
    // Observe each target block
	if (targetBlocks.length) {
		targetBlocks.forEach(block => {
			observer.observe(block);
		});
	}
   
})();
</script>

document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
  document.querySelectorAll('.iframe-wrapper.js-video').forEach((wrap) => {
    const overlay = wrap.querySelector('.video-overlay');
    const iframe = wrap.querySelector('iframe.video-iframe');
    if (!overlay || !iframe) return;

    overlay.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
      e.preventDefault();
      e.stopPropagation();

      const base = iframe.dataset.src;
      if (!base) return;

      const joiner = base.includes('?') ? '&' : '?';
      iframe.src = base + joiner + 'autoplay=1';

      overlay.style.display = 'none';
    }, true);
  });
});

 For Parents

 Treatment Outcomes 

 Careers 

 CE 

 About Us 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
Age-Specific Mental Health & Substance Use Treatment

We help teens, young adults, adults, and their families overcome challenges with substance use, addiction, and mental health conditions.

 
 

 

 
 

 

Our Treatment Approach

 

 

 
 

 
 

 
 

 

 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
We’re excited to announce expanded age eligibility!

Now accepting clients ages 18–35 for PHP/IOP services and at The Alps Residential Treatment Center (RTC).

 

 

 

 
 
 

 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Our Accreditations

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Age-Specific Treatment

Get the care you need for wherever you are in life.

Different stages of life need different kinds of care, which is why our rehab for young adults and teens provides age-specific care for mental health and substance use disorders.

 See Locations 

 

 

 

 

 
 

Care for Teens (13-18)

Find the momentum you need with evidence-based treatment built for the developing brain and the unique pressures teens are under.

 

 
 

Care for Young Adults (18-35*)

Get your feet back under you with expert care built to help young adults navigate major life transitions and mental health and substance use challenges.

 

 
 

Care for Adults (18+)

Get stable fast with detox programs and personalized care designed to empower adults to break entrenched patterns.

 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
How We Are Different

Sandstone Care aims to drive positive lasting change in real people. We understand that you have unique circumstances, so we offer a more personalized experience than you would find anywhere else.

 Call (888) 850-1890   Verify Insurance 

 

 

 

 

 

Age-Specific Care

We are age-specific, not gender-specific. We focus on the unique circumstances that you face at your specific stage of life.

 

Evidence-Based Therapy

We only use treatment interventions that have been scientifically proven to provide consistent, lasting recovery.

 

Small Group Sizes

You are more than a number, which is why we provide an intimate setting where your voice can be heard.

 

Individualized Treatment Plans

No one person is the same, and neither is their recovery journey. Your treatment program will be tailored to your unique needs.

 

Academic and Vocational Support

We want you to get the most out of life, which means feeling your best in the classroom or at your job.

 

The Family Component

Recovery involves the entire family, so we provide support for the whole family system.

 
 

 
 

 
 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 

 

 
 

 

 
Find compassionate treatment in centers across the U.S.

We help people by providing age-specific mental health and substance use treatment. With a growing number of locations across the nation and telehealth options, we’re ready to help with recovery and change.

 

 
 See Locations See Our Approach 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
What Clients Are Saying

 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 

Robert’s Story

 

 “I had no idea what to expect for Sandstone, but it was everything I needed and more. Everybody (at Sandstone) really cares about what they’re doing and cares to see everybody get better.” 

 

 

 

 
Robert

Alumni
 

 

 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 

Alex’s Story

 

 “Things progressed where I was at the point that I wanted to die…My life now is very different after going through treatment at Sandstone…The people here, they really care.” 

 

 

 

 
Alex

Alumni
 

 

 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 

Jesse’s Story

 

 “Sandstone helped me to dig deep… and it taught me how to have a relationship with myself and relationships with others again. I was able to take the mask off, and I don’t have to put it back on.” 

 

 

 

 
Jesse

Alumni
 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
In Network With Most Major Insurance

 Instantly Verify Insurance 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 

 

 

 

Cost & Insurance

Make a financial plan with a transparent, helpful team.

We know how stressful working with insurance and managing finances can be.

 

 

 Verify Insurance 

Quickly verify your insurance online by answering a few confidential questions, such as contact details and insurance info. 

 

 Talk to a Coordinator 

Give our admissions coordinators a call and we’ll verify insurance for you on the phone and talk you through available options. 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

Your Teen Deserves Treatment That Works

You may have felt helpless watching your teen lose the ability to enjoy things like they used to. Something needs to change , but it can seem like everything you try to do to reach them only makes things worse.

In a recent study, our clients who completed treatment reported a 48% decrease in anxiety symptoms and a 63% decrease in symptoms of depression.

At Sandstone Care, we understand that sending your child to a residential treatment center is not something done on a whim. Which is why we track our outcomes closely, so you can feel confident that treatment is not just a shot in the dark, it’s an evidence-based, proven step towards a better life.

 Read Full Treatment Outcomes 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Why Age-Specific Care?

As we grow and change, our ways of handling addiction and mental health challenges change, too. Our treatment philosophy acknowledges this and leverages it to achieve effective treatment for everyone.

Whether you’re the parent of a teen who needs treatment, a young adult exploring outpatient options, or an adult in need of detox, you’re guaranteed to find what you need at one of our facilities. Explore our age-specific treatment below.

 

 

 

 

 
 
 Collapse All -->
 Expand All -->
 
 
 

 

 
 

 

 
 
Rehab for Teens: Teen Alcohol Rehab, Drug Rehab, & Mental Health Treatment

 
 
 

 
Being the parent of a teenager who struggles with substance use or mental health issues can be frightening. Many parents feel helpless and don’t know where to turn. If your teen is using drugs or alcohol or showing signs of mental illnesses, it might be time to consider treatment.

At Sandstone Care, we offer comprehensive mental health and substance use treatment for teens through our continuum of care that meets your teen where they are. And all of our teen programming offers academic support to make sure they stay on top of their schooling during treatment.

If you’re ready to find your teen the treatment they need, trust Sandstone Care to help your teen navigate their mental health struggles and overcome substance use disorder.

Explore the different levels of care for teens offered at Sandstone Care.

 

 

 

 
 

 

 
 
Rehab For Young Adults: Mental Health & Substance Use Programming

 
 
 

 
Young adults face critical life transitions, such as moving from high school to college, entering the workforce, or becoming parents. For those dealing with mental health or substance use issues, these changes can be especially challenging. And for many young adults, fear of judgment can make seeking treatment feel out of the question.

At Sandstone Care’s young adult rehab facilities, you’ll meet peers who know exactly what you’re going through and can support you. Whether you need detox or outpatient treatment, our continuum of care will meet you wherever you are in the recovery journey.

Don’t let the challenges of adulthood or fear of judgment stand in the way of your sobriety and mental health. Let our programming help you build a happier, healthier future.

Explore the different levels of care for young adults offered at Sandstone Care.

 

 

 

 
 

 

 
 
Adult Treatment Centers: Drug & Alcohol Detox

 
 
 

 
Between work commitments and family responsibilities, it’s easy to feel like you don’t have the time to take care of yourself, let alone address your substance use. Whether you are nervous about stepping into detox or wondering, “How can I find a drug rehab for adults near me?”, Sandstone Care is here to help.

With individualized treatment programs, small program sizes, and dual diagnosis treatments, your detox journey will make sure you are empowered to reclaim every part of your life. Our evidence-based methods will help you to battle your addiction, improve your mental health, and heal strained relationships with your loved ones.

It’s time to get back on your feet. From the moment you step through our doors, our skilled team is dedicated to supporting you, extending our assistance through every stage—from intake to aftercare.

Explore our adult levels of care today.

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 

 

 
 

 

 
Let us know what’s on your mind.

Talk with an admissions coordinator today and find out how our programs work, what options are available, and how we can help.

 

 

 
 Call (888) 850-1890 Verify Insurance 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Our Levels of Care

Access our full range of treatments for substance use disorders.

 Learn more about levels of care 

 

 

 

 
 
 

Medical Detox and Inpatient
 
 

Residential Treatment
 
 

Day Treatment (PHP)
 
 

Intensive Outpatient (IOP)
 

 

Medical Detox and Inpatient

5-21 days of 24/7 on-site medical supervision.

Our Medically-Assisted Detox and Inpatient Center offers private rooms and 24/7 medically supervised care to support a safe recovery from drugs and alcohol, followed by comprehensive treatment that addresses your physical, psychological, emotional, and spiritual needs.

 

 
 

 

Medical Detox Explained 

 

 

Residential Treatment

30-45 days of on-site 24/7 treatment.

We provide residential treatment centers (RTCs) for teens 13-17 (18 in MD if still in high school) and young adults 18-35, treating mental health challenges including anxiety, depression, trauma, and substance use.

Our teen RTCs treat adolescents in a serene setting with smaller group sizes and a focus on strengthening the family unit. The length of stay is 30-45 days. Our young adult RTC offers young adults a peaceful environment in which they can be treated for mental health challenges. Both RTCs create a distraction-free space for healing, helping clients return to daily life feeling more balanced and well.

 

 
 

 

Teen Residential Care Explained 

 

 

Day Treatment (PHP)

4 weeks of on-site day treatment.

Our Teen & Young Adult Day Treatment program, also known as Partial Hospitalization Program (PHP), is a highly structured level of care that offers five days of robust programming a week.

Our mental health and substance use programming helps clients to stabilize, begin to understand their mental health and/or addiction struggles, and heal from them. We strive to help our clients become more like the person they want to be, without using negative coping strategies or substances to get there.

 

 
 

 

PHP Explained 

 

 

Intensive Outpatient (IOP)

12 weeks of on-site or virtual treatment.

Our Teen & Young Adult IOP, or Intensive Outpatient Program, consists of 3-4 days of weekly programming that treats mental health challenges such as depression, trauma, anxiety, and substance use.

IOP includes individual therapy, group therapy, and family therapy. This flexible treatment option occurs in the evening hours so you can continue meeting your school or work responsibilities while receiving care.

 

 
 

 

What is IOP?

 

 

 

 

 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
How To Get Started

Give us a confidential call and we’ll take you through each step.

We’ll walk through the process, listen to your story, and determine how we can help.

No matter what, we’re committed to helping you access the care you need. Call for yourself or a loved one and start living your life again.

 Call (888) 850 1890   Verify Insurance 

 

 

 

 

 

 Admissions 

Know what to expect during the admissions process.

 

 Locations 

Find out where we’re located and what the centers are like.

 

 Diagnosis 

Discover how we assess clients and make recommendations.

 
 

 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 

 

 
 

“Sandstone proved their program from day one.”

“I cannot recommend this facility enough if you are going through a crisis in your family or life, they truly CARE.”

 

 

 

 

 
Bonnie

Parent

As Seen in the Press

Our scientifically proven and evidence-based treatment process continues to earn national praise and foster relationships with the following:

 

 

 

 

 

 
 

iHeart Radio

Immanuel Jones shares his survival story from suicide attempt to suicide prevention tips, and helping young people cope with mental health issues.

 

 

 
 

Fox News

Erika Alhashmi LPC warns about the danger of teens self-diagnosing their mental health disorders on TikTok.

 

 

 
 

NBC

Peter King LCPC, explains how Sandstone Care provides age-specific, not gender-specific treatment for teens and adults in the LGBTQIA+ community.

 

 

 
 

CBS

Adrienne Washington LCPC, explains the negative impact of social media and provides tips for users and parents.

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Mental Health Treatment Options

 Call (888) 850-1890   Verify Insurance 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Depression Treatment

Depression is more than just feeling down for a few days — symptoms are long lasting and can affect you in many ways.

 

Anxiety & Bi-Polar Treatment

Anxiety disorders are thought patterns of fear, dread, and uneasiness that affect other aspects of your life.

 

Trauma & PTSD Treatment

Trauma is the emotional response to a specific event like an accident, sexual abuse, or a natural disaster.

 

 ADHD & Borderline Personality Disorder Treatment

ADHD is marked by difficulty focusing, controlling impulsive behaviors, and over-activity.

 
 

 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Treatment Resources

Learn more about mental health and substance use treatment and challenges.

We address some of the biggest questions about treatment, care, and recovery with resources for those personally struggling, their parents and loved ones, and professionals.

 Resources For Parents Resources For Professionals

.footer-menu-accordeon .menu-item-has-children > a {
  font-family: Montserrat;
  font-weight: 700;
  font-size: 18px;
  line-height: 32px;
  letter-spacing: 0%;
  display: block;
  position: relative;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 10px;
}
.footer-menu-accordeon .menu-item-has-children > a svg path {
  transition: 0.3s;
}
.footer-menu-accordeon .menu-item-has-children > a:hover svg path, .footer-menu-accordeon .menu-item-has-children > a:focus svg path {
  fill: #0edde9;
}

  margin-top: 35px;
}
.footer-menu-accordeon .menu-item-has-children > .sub-menu {
  margin-top: 5px !important;
}
.footer-menu-accordeon .menu-item-has-children > .sub-menu li a {
  font-family: Montserrat;
  font-weight: 400;
  font-size: 16px;
  line-height: 21px;
  letter-spacing: 0%;
  text-align: left !important;
}
.footer-menu-accordeon .menu-item-has-children > .sub-menu li a strong {
  font-weight: 700;
}
.footer-menu-accordeon .sub-menu {

  overflow: hidden;
  transition: max-height 0.3s ease;
}

  max-height: 1000px;
}

  display: block;

  color: #fff;

}

  }

    margin-top: 15px;
  }
  .footer-column__ac_title {
    margin-bottom: 15px;

  }

  }

class="image-text__content"><h2>Addiction and Mental Health Care With Heart</h2>
<p>At Sandstone Care, we know that addiction and mental health issues are some of the most difficult challenges our clients will ever face.</p>
<p>Our incredible team leverages their experience, expertise, and empathy to show each person who comes into treatment how to overcome these challenges and lead healthier, happier lives.</p>
<p><strong>Whether you’re a person in need of treatment, or a professional looking for a workplace that aligns with your values, you’ve come to the right place. </strong></p>
<div class='container-fluid blurb-container'><div class='row'><div class='l-blurb__col col-12 col-md-6'><article class="icon_image_small blurb js-blurb blurb--default_column_style is-linked"><h5 class='blurb__title'><a href='/locations/' target='' class='blurb__title cta-link'>I Need Treatment</a></h5><div class='blurb__content'>Find a mental health or substance use rehab near you.</div></article></div><div class='l-blurb__col col-12 col-md-6'><article class="icon_image_small blurb js-blurb blurb--default_column_style is-linked"><h5 class='blurb__title'><a href='/about/careers/' target='' class='blurb__title cta-link'>I Want a Job</a></h5><div class='blurb__content'>Join a company that celebrates your success and wants you to thrive.</div></article></div></div></div></div></div></div>
                

            </div>
        </div>
    </section><section  id="gutenblock-block_acf-block-698a24962a7da" class="gutenblock js-gutenblock gutenblock--oms-columns bg-color-blue_dark none hide_mountain  num_columns_5">

                <h2>Key Elements of Our Treatment Approach</h2>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>


                    <div class="l-columns__row row"><div class="l-columns__col list-item-column list-item-column col-12 col-sm-6 col-md-4 col-xl-5th"><article class="icon_image blurb js-blurb blurb--card_column_style has-slim-padding "><div class='blurb__image-wrap blurb__image-wrap--icon_image'><img width="100" height="100" src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20100%20100'%3E%3C/svg%3E" class="blurb__image" alt="Icon Open Book Heart" data-lazy-src="https://www.sandstonecare.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/06/icon-open-book-heart.svg" /><noscript><img width="100" height="100" src="https://www.sandstonecare.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/06/icon-open-book-heart.svg" class="blurb__image" alt="Icon Open Book Heart" /></noscript></div><h5 class='blurb__title'>Evidence-Based Curriculum</h5><div class='blurb__content'><p style="text-align: left;">Using the latest research to address your deepest physical, mental, and emotional issues.</p>
</div></article></div><div class="l-columns__col list-item-column list-item-column col-12 col-sm-6 col-md-4 col-xl-5th"><article class="icon_image blurb js-blurb blurb--card_column_style has-slim-padding "><div class='blurb__image-wrap blurb__image-wrap--icon_image'><img width="100" height="100" src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20100%20100'%3E%3C/svg%3E" class="blurb__image" alt="Age-Specific Care" data-lazy-src="https://www.sandstonecare.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/10/1469415_Icons_AgeSpecificCare_093022.svg" /><noscript><img width="100" height="100" src="https://www.sandstonecare.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/10/1469415_Icons_AgeSpecificCare_093022.svg" class="blurb__image" alt="Age-Specific Care" /></noscript></div><h5 class='blurb__title'>Age Appropriate Care</h5><div class='blurb__content'><p style="text-align: left;">Assessing where you are from a developmental standpoint and creating a treatment program based on your needs.</p>
</div></article></div><div class="l-columns__col list-item-column list-item-column col-12 col-sm-6 col-md-4 col-xl-5th"><article class="icon_image blurb js-blurb blurb--card_column_style has-slim-padding "><div class='blurb__image-wrap blurb__image-wrap--icon_image'><img width="100" height="100" src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20100%20100'%3E%3C/svg%3E" class="blurb__image" alt="Academic and Vocational Support" data-lazy-src="https://www.sandstonecare.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/10/1469415_Icons_AcademicAndVocationalSupport_093022.svg" /><noscript><img width="100" height="100" src="https://www.sandstonecare.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/10/1469415_Icons_AcademicAndVocationalSupport_093022.svg" class="blurb__image" alt="Academic and Vocational Support" /></noscript></div><h5 class='blurb__title'>Academic Support</h5><div class='blurb__content'><p style="text-align: left;">Including academic support in our programs to help teens get on track for academic success.</p>
</div></article></div><div class="l-columns__col list-item-column list-item-column col-12 col-sm-6 col-md-4 col-xl-5th"><article class="icon_image blurb js-blurb blurb--card_column_style has-slim-padding "><div class='blurb__image-wrap blurb__image-wrap--icon_image'><img width="100" height="100" src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20100%20100'%3E%3C/svg%3E" class="blurb__image" alt="Icon Person Refresh" data-lazy-src="https://www.sandstonecare.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/06/icon-person-refresh.svg" /><noscript><img width="100" height="100" src="https://www.sandstonecare.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/06/icon-person-refresh.svg" class="blurb__image" alt="Icon Person Refresh" /></noscript></div><h5 class='blurb__title'>Individualized Treatment</h5><div class='blurb__content'><p style="text-align: left;">Developing an individualized plan that helps you discover your own values, beliefs, strengths, and passions.</p>
</div></article></div><div class="l-columns__col list-item-column list-item-column col-12 col-sm-6 col-md-4 col-xl-5th"><article class="icon_image blurb js-blurb blurb--card_column_style has-slim-padding "><div class='blurb__image-wrap blurb__image-wrap--icon_image'><img width="100" height="100" src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20100%20100'%3E%3C/svg%3E" class="blurb__image" alt="The Family Component" data-lazy-src="https://www.sandstonecare.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/10/1469415_Icons_TheFamilyComponent_093022.svg" /><noscript><img width="100" height="100" src="https://www.sandstonecare.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/10/1469415_Icons_TheFamilyComponent_093022.svg" class="blurb__image" alt="The Family Component" /></noscript></div><h5 class='blurb__title'>Family Treatment</h5><div class='blurb__content'><p style="text-align: left;">Improving the quality of life as a family through therapy sessions allows your family to be open and honest about challenges.</p>
</div></article></div></div>

<h2><span class="ui-provider va b c d e f g h i j k l m n o p q r s t u v w x y z ab ac ae af ag ah ai aj ak" dir="ltr">Inspire & Empower Change</span></h2>
<p><span class="ui-provider va b c d e f g h i j k l m n o p q r s t u v w x y z ab ac ae af ag ah ai aj ak" dir="ltr">Rick McKenzie and Marcello La Rocca talk about the beginning of Sandstone Care and how we’ve grown from one outpatient center to a full continuum of care spanning the United States.<br />
</span></p>
<p>Listen to the story of how the founders’ philosophy evolved into the company’s core value and mission: <strong>Inspire and Empower Change</strong>.</p>

class="l-image-text__col l-image-text__col--text list-item-column col-12 col-lg-6 order-2 order-lg-1"><div class="image-text__content"><h2>LGBTQ+ Respected Care</h2>
<p>The journey to substance use and mental health recovery for those in the LGBTQ+ community often involves overcoming unique challenges linked to societal discrimination, stigma, and judgment. That’s why it’s important that we foster an environment where everyone feels seen, accepted, and respected.</p>
<p>You should never feel worried about sharing who you are, especially when looking for a space to heal. Sandstone Care ensures you are treated with the respect and understanding that you deserve.</p>

                    <div class="l-video-text__row row align-items-center justify-content-center"><div class="l-video-text__col l-video-text__col--text list-item-column col-12 col-lg-6 order-2 order-lg-0"><div class="image-text__content"><h2>Diversity, Equity, & Inclusion</h2>
<p>By embracing diversity within our team, we ensure that our clients have the chance to connect with individuals who can empathize with and understand their unique experiences.</p>
<p>We are committed to fostering a culture of diversity, equity, & inclusion that not only enriches the lives of our employees, but also ensures the well-being and care of our clients, regardless of their race, ethnicity, gender identity, sexual orientation, socioeconomic status, age, ability, or background.</p>
<p>We believe that embracing diversity and promoting equity and inclusion are integral to our mission of providing high-quality behavioral health services. This DEI Charter outlines our core principles and commitments to uphold these values within our organization.</p>
</div></div><div class="l-video-text__col l-video-text__col--video list-item-column col-12 col-lg-6">

<p>They’ll give you the tools you need to take charge of your life by focusing on the following values:</p>

						<div class="l-blurb__col list-item-column blurb_column  col-12 col-sm-6 col-md-4 "><article class="icon_image_small blurb js-blurb blurb--default_column_style "><div class='blurb__image-wrap blurb__image-wrap--icon_image_small'><img width="100" height="100" src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20100%20100'%3E%3C/svg%3E" class="blurb__image" alt="Icon Sun Heart" data-lazy-src="https://www.sandstonecare.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/06/icon-sun-heart.svg" /><noscript><img width="100" height="100" src="https://www.sandstonecare.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/06/icon-sun-heart.svg" class="blurb__image" alt="Icon Sun Heart" /></noscript></div><h5 class='blurb__title'>Commitment </h5><div class='blurb__content'><p>Learn how to stay dedicated to sustainable change by identifying your values and beliefs.</p>
</div></article><article class="icon_image_small blurb js-blurb blurb--default_column_style "><div class='blurb__image-wrap blurb__image-wrap--icon_image_small'><img width="100" height="100" src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20100%20100'%3E%3C/svg%3E" class="blurb__image" alt="road signs icon" data-lazy-src="https://www.sandstonecare.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/06/icon-road-signs.svg" /><noscript><img width="100" height="100" src="https://www.sandstonecare.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/06/icon-road-signs.svg" class="blurb__image" alt="road signs icon" /></noscript></div><h5 class='blurb__title'>Life Skills</h5><div class='blurb__content'><p>Tackle life’s challenges with confidence by learning healthier coping skills to manage stress.</p>

class="image-text__content"><h2>Your Care Team</h2>
<p><strong>At Sandstone Care, we’ve built a team that’s as committed to your healing as you are.</strong></p>
<p>Each of our clinicians draw on their extensive experience in the addiction and mental health fields to provide the highest quality care. Every therapist, clinician, and staff member is committed to helping clients take their lives back from addiction or mental health struggles.</p>
<p>To date, our team has guided thousands of individuals down the road to lasting recovery.</p>

Opportunity</p>
<h2>Support for Your Continued Commitment to Recovery</h2>
<p><span class="ui-provider wc b c d e f g h i j k l m n o p q r s t u v w x y z ab ac ae af ag ah ai aj ak" dir="ltr">Sandstone Care is offering a $5,000 college scholarship for individuals who are struggling or have struggled with substance use or mental health conditions.</p>
<p>Sandstone Care recognizes and appreciates the courage and bravery it takes for a young person to seek help. This is why it is our mission to overcome stigma and help support your future success in recovery.</span></p>
<p><a class="btn-primary" href="https://www.sandstonecare.com/scholarship/">Apply Now</a></p>

                <h2 style="text-align: center;">As Seen in the Press</h2>
<p style="text-align: center;">Our scientifically proven and evidence-based treatment process continues to earn national praise and foster relationships with the following:</p>
<p class="pre-title">
            </div>

    </div>


                    <div class="l-columns__row row"><div class="l-columns__col list-item-column list-item-column col-12 col-sm-6 col-xl-3"><a href='https://www.iheart.com/podcast/1248-front-range-focus-93390146/episode/checking-on-the-mental-health-of-94015648/' target='_blank' class='icon_image blurb js-blurb blurb--card_column_style has-padding is-linked'><div class='blurb__image-wrap blurb__image-wrap--icon_image'><img width="187" height="187" src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20187%20187'%3E%3C/svg%3E" class="blurb__image" alt="iHeart radio logo" data-lazy-src="https://www.sandstonecare.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/10/1.svg" /><noscript><img width="187" height="187" src="https://www.sandstonecare.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/10/1.svg" class="blurb__image" alt="iHeart radio logo" /></noscript></div><h5 class='blurb__title cta-link'>iHeart Radio</h5><div class='blurb__content'><p style="text-align: left;">Immanuel Jones shares his survival story from suicide attempt to suicide prevention tips, and helping young people cope with mental health issues.</p>

<script>
const url = new URL(window.location.href);
const params = url.searchParams;

// Normalize params to lowercase
const normalized = {};
for (const [key, value] of params.entries()) {
	normalized[key.toLowerCase()] = value;
}

const paramDefs = [
	{ name: 'gad_source', label: 'GAD Source' },
	{ name: 'gad_campaignid', label: 'GAD Campaign ID' },
	{ name: 'gbraid', label: 'GBRAID' },
	{ name: 'gclid', label: 'GCLID' },
	{ name: 'utm_source', label: 'UTM Source' },
	{ name: 'utm_medium', label: 'UTM Medium' },
	{ name: 'utm_campaign', label: 'UTM Campaign' },
	{ name: 'utm_content', label: 'UTM Content' },
	{ name: 'msclkid', label: 'MS Click ID' },
];

const queryData = paramDefs
	.filter(def => normalized[def.name] !== undefined)
	.map(def => ({
		name: def.name,
		label: def.label,
		type: 'string',
		data: normalized[def.name]
	}));

// Inject into Talkative config
window.talkativeCustomConfig = {
	events: {
		enterStandby() {
			if (window.talkativeApi?.interactionData && queryData.length > 0) {
				window.talkativeApi.interactionData.appendInteractionData(queryData);
			}
		}
	}
};

import(`https://us.engage.app/api/ecs/v1/loader/a9b2f753-a85e-4356-be2a-746e023b3b81.js?path=${encodeURIComponent(window.location.origin+window.location.pathname)}`)
</script>

function handleCheckboxChange() {
    const checkbox = document.querySelector('.sms_input input');
    const fieldValue = document.querySelector('.sms_field_value input');
    if (checkbox && fieldValue) {
        fieldValue.value = checkbox.checked ? 'true' : 'false';
    }
}

function initializeCheckboxHandler() {
    const checkbox = document.querySelector('.sms_input input');
    if (checkbox) {
        checkbox.addEventListener('change', handleCheckboxChange);
        handleCheckboxChange();
    }
}

function observeFormChanges() {
    const observer = new MutationObserver(() => {
        initializeCheckboxHandler();
    });
    const form = document.querySelector('form');
    if (form) {
        observer.observe(form, { childList: true, subtree: true });
    }
}

initializeCheckboxHandler();
observeFormChanges();

</script>

<script type="rocketlazyloadscript" data-rocket-type="text/javascript">
function getParameterByName(name, url = window.location.href) {
	name = name.replace(/[\[\]]/g, '\\$&');
	var regex = new RegExp('[?&]' + name + '(=([^&#]*)|&|#|$)');
	var results = regex.exec(url);
	if (!results) return null;
	if (!results[2]) return '';
	return decodeURIComponent(results[2].replace(/\+/g, ' '));
}

function setCookie(name, value, days) {
	let expires = "";
	if (days) {
		let date = new Date();
		date.setTime(date.getTime() + days * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000);
		expires = "; expires=" + date.toUTCString();
	}
	document.cookie = name + "=" + (value || "") + expires + "; path=/";
}

function getCookie(name) {
	let nameEQ = name + "=";
	let ca = document.cookie.split(';');
	for (let i = 0; i < ca.length; i++) {
		let c = ca[i].trim();
		if (c.indexOf(nameEQ) === 0) return c.substring(nameEQ.length, c.length);
	}
	return null;
}

function getUTMParameterOrCookie(paramName) {
	let paramValue = getParameterByName(paramName);
	if (paramValue) {
		setCookie(paramName, paramValue, 30); // Save in cookie for 30 days
	} else {
		paramValue = getCookie(paramName); // Get from cookie if not in URL
	}
	return paramValue;
}

function getTrafficSource() {
	var lookupTable = {
		"pinterest / cpc": "Pinterest Paid",
		"pinterest.com / referral": "Pinterest Organic",
		"google / cpc": "Google Adwords",
		"bing / cpc": "Bing Paid",
		"facebook / cpc": "Facebook Paid",
		"youtube.com / referral": "YouTube",
		"search.yahoo.com / referral": "Yahoo Organic",
		"GMBlisting / organic": "Organic Maps",
		"google.com / referral": "Google Organic",
		"psychologytoday.com / referral": "Psychology Today",
		"bing.com / referral": "Bing Organic",
		"facebook.com / banner": "Facebook",
		"m.facebook.com / referral": "Facebook",
		"facebook.com / referral": "Facebook",
		"l.facebook.com / referral": "Facebook",
		"lm.facebook.com / referral": "Facebook",
	};

	function determineTrafficSource() {
		var gclid = getUTMParameterOrCookie('gclid'); // Check gclid in URL or cookies
		var msclkid = getUTMParameterOrCookie('msclkid'); // Check msclkid in URL or cookies
		var utm_source = getUTMParameterOrCookie('utm_source');
		var utm_medium = getUTMParameterOrCookie('utm_medium');
		var referral = document.referrer;

		// If gclid exists, the traffic source is Google Adwords
		if (gclid) {
			return "Google Adwords";
		}

		var sourceKey = "";

		if (msclkid) {
			sourceKey = "bing / cpc";
		} else if (utm_source === "pinterest") {
			sourceKey = "pinterest / cpc";
		} else if (utm_source && utm_medium) {
			sourceKey = utm_source + " / " + utm_medium;
		} else if (utm_medium === "facebook") {
			sourceKey = "facebook / cpc";
		} else if (referral) {
			var referrerDomain = referral.split('/')[2].replace(/^www\./, '');
			sourceKey = referrerDomain + " / referral";
		} else {
			sourceKey = "";
		}

		return lookupTable[sourceKey] || "Website";
	}

	function getStoredTrafficSource() {
		var cookieMatch = getCookie('trafficSource');
		if (cookieMatch) {
			try {
				// Декодируем строку перед парсингом
				var storedSource = JSON.parse(decodeURIComponent(cookieMatch));
				return storedSource.source;
			} catch (error) {
				console.error("Error parsing trafficSource cookie:", error);
				return null;
			}
		}
		return null;
	}

	var detectedSource = determineTrafficSource();
	var storedSource = getStoredTrafficSource();

	// Update cookies if any UTM parameters or traffic source changes
	var sourceString = JSON.stringify({ source: detectedSource });
	if (storedSource !== detectedSource) {
		setCookie("trafficSource", sourceString, 90);
	}

	return detectedSource;
}

// Example usage
var trafficSource = getTrafficSource();
console.log("Traffic Source:", trafficSource);

// Function to handle GCLID
function handleGclid() {
	let gclid = getUTMParameterOrCookie('gclid');
	const forms = document.querySelectorAll('form');

	forms.forEach((form) => {
		const gclidField = form.querySelector('.GCLID input');
		if (gclidField) gclidField.value = gclid;
	});

	console.log("Handled GCLID:", gclid);
}

// Call handleGclid if traffic source is Google Adwords
if (trafficSource === "Google Adwords") {
	handleGclid();
}



// Fill UTM fields in forms
function fillFieldsInForms() {
	
	var utm_source = getUTMParameterOrCookie('utm_source');
	var utm_medium = getUTMParameterOrCookie('utm_medium');
	var utm_campaign = getUTMParameterOrCookie('utm_campaign');
	var utm_content = getUTMParameterOrCookie('utm_content');

	const forms = document.querySelectorAll('form');
	forms.forEach((form) => {
		const utmSrcField = form.querySelector('.SRC input');
		if (utmSrcField) utmSrcField.value = trafficSource;
		
		const utmSourceField = form.querySelector('.utm_source input');
		if (utmSourceField) utmSourceField.value = utm_source;

		const utmMediumField = form.querySelector('.utm_medium input');
		if (utmMediumField) utmMediumField.value = utm_medium;

		const utmCampaignField = form.querySelector('.utm_campaign input');
		if (utmCampaignField) utmCampaignField.value = utm_campaign;

		const utmContentField = form.querySelector('.utm_content input');
		if (utmContentField) utmContentField.value = utm_content;
	});

	// Log all UTM parameters and GCLID
	console.log("UTM Source:", utm_source);
	console.log("UTM Medium:", utm_medium);
	console.log("UTM Campaign:", utm_campaign);
	console.log("UTM Content:", utm_content);
	console.log("GCLID:", getUTMParameterOrCookie('gclid'));
}

fillFieldsInForms();

</script>

const links = document.querySelectorAll('.block_anchor_link');

if (links.length > 0) {
	links.forEach(link => {
		link.addEventListener('click', function (event) {
			event.preventDefault();
			event.stopImmediatePropagation();

			const blockRefId = this.getAttribute('data-block_ref_id');
			if (blockRefId) {
				const allLinks = document.querySelectorAll('.block_anchor_link');
				allLinks.forEach(item => {
					item.classList.remove('active');
				});
				
				this.classList.add('active');
				const targetElement = document.querySelector(blockRefId);
				if (targetElement) {
					const heading = targetElement.querySelector('h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6');
					const scrollTarget = heading || targetElement;
	
					const targetPosition = scrollTarget.getBoundingClientRect().top + window.scrollY;

					let offset = 145;

					if(window.matchMedia('(max-width: 768px)').matches) {
						offset = 170;
					}

					//console.log(offset);

					window.scrollTo({
						top: targetPosition - offset,
						behavior: 'smooth'
					});
					document.querySelector('#jumplink-nav').classList.remove('show');
					document.querySelector('#post-nav-trigger').classList.remove('open');
				}
			}
		});
	});
}

</script>

<script type="rocketlazyloadscript" data-rocket-type="text/javascript">
(() => {
	     function loadScriptWhenInView(entries, observer) {
        entries.forEach(entry => {
            if (entry.isIntersecting) {
                let scriptTag = entry.target.querySelector('script[data-src]');
                if (scriptTag) {
                    // Move data-src to src to load the script
                    let dataSrc = scriptTag.getAttribute('data-src');
                    scriptTag.setAttribute('src', dataSrc);
                    scriptTag.removeAttribute('data-src');
                    
                    // Optionally, stop observing once the script is loaded
                    observer.unobserve(entry.target);
                }
            }
        });
    }

    // Create an IntersectionObserver
    let observer = new IntersectionObserver(loadScriptWhenInView, {
        root: null, // Use the viewport as root
        rootMargin: '200px 0px', // Trigger 200px before the element enters the viewport
        threshold: 0 // Trigger as soon as any part of the element is in view
    });

    // Target the container block with class 'form-columns__form-wrap'
    let targetBlocks = document.querySelectorAll('.form-columns__form-wrap');
    
    // Observe each target block
	if (targetBlocks.length) {
		targetBlocks.forEach(block => {
			observer.observe(block);
		});
	}
   
})();
</script>

<script type="rocketlazyloadscript">
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
  document.querySelectorAll('.iframe-wrapper.js-video').forEach((wrap) => {
    const overlay = wrap.querySelector('.video-overlay');
    const iframe = wrap.querySelector('iframe.video-iframe');
    if (!overlay || !iframe) return;

    overlay.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
      e.preventDefault();
      e.stopPropagation();

      const base = iframe.dataset.src;
      if (!base) return;

      const joiner = base.includes('?') ? '&' : '?';
      iframe.src = base + joiner + 'autoplay=1';

      overlay.style.display = 'none';
    }, true);
  });
});
</script>

 Home Page / About Us 
 Get To Know Us 
About Sandstone Care

Explore our core values, history, and holistic approach to addiction and mental health treatment.

 
 

 

 
 

 

Who We Are

 

 

 
 

 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 
We’re here to help 24/7

 

 

 (888) 850-1890 Verify Insurance 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Our Accreditations

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 

Sandstone Care Program Overview

 

Addiction and Mental Health Care With Heart

At Sandstone Care, we know that addiction and mental health issues are some of the most difficult challenges our clients will ever face.

Our incredible team leverages their experience, expertise, and empathy to show each person who comes into treatment how to overcome these challenges and lead healthier, happier lives.

 Whether you’re a person in need of treatment, or a professional looking for a workplace that aligns with your values, you’ve come to the right place.  

 I Need Treatment 

Find a mental health or substance use rehab near you.

 I Want a Job 

Join a company that celebrates your success and wants you to thrive.

 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Key Elements of Our Treatment Approach

 

 

 

 

 

Evidence-Based Curriculum

Using the latest research to address your deepest physical, mental, and emotional issues.

 

Age Appropriate Care

Assessing where you are from a developmental standpoint and creating a treatment program based on your needs.

 

Academic Support

Including academic support in our programs to help teens get on track for academic success.

 

Individualized Treatment

Developing an individualized plan that helps you discover your own values, beliefs, strengths, and passions.

 

Family Treatment

Improving the quality of life as a family through therapy sessions allows your family to be open and honest about challenges.

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
“RIPCAP”

At Sandstone Care, our core values are more than just words — they’re a way of life that defines our company culture.

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 
 

 

 

 

How We Got Started

 Inspire & Empower Change 

 Rick McKenzie and Marcello La Rocca talk about the beginning of Sandstone Care and how we’ve grown from one outpatient center to a full continuum of care spanning the United States.

 

Listen to the story of how the founders’ philosophy evolved into the company’s core value and mission: Inspire and Empower Change .

 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

LGBTQ+ Respected Care

The journey to substance use and mental health recovery for those in the LGBTQ+ community often involves overcoming unique challenges linked to societal discrimination, stigma, and judgment. That’s why it’s important that we foster an environment where everyone feels seen, accepted, and respected.

You should never feel worried about sharing who you are, especially when looking for a space to heal. Sandstone Care ensures you are treated with the respect and understanding that you deserve.

 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 
 

 

 

 

Diversity, Equity, & Inclusion

By embracing diversity within our team, we ensure that our clients have the chance to connect with individuals who can empathize with and understand their unique experiences.

We are committed to fostering a culture of diversity, equity, & inclusion that not only enriches the lives of our employees, but also ensures the well-being and care of our clients, regardless of their race, ethnicity, gender identity, sexual orientation, socioeconomic status, age, ability, or background.

We believe that embracing diversity and promoting equity and inclusion are integral to our mission of providing high-quality behavioral health services. This DEI Charter outlines our core principles and commitments to uphold these values within our organization.

 

 
 

 

The importance of Diversity, Equity, & Inclusion

 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Let Our Therapists Show You The Way

 When you enter treatment with us, our therapists will work to help you identify your strengths as well as your challenges. 

They’ll give you the tools you need to take charge of your life by focusing on the following values:

 Call (888) 850-1890   Verify Insurance 

 

 

 

 

 

Commitment 

Learn how to stay dedicated to sustainable change by identifying your values and beliefs.

 

Life Skills

Tackle life’s challenges with confidence by learning healthier coping skills to manage stress.

 

Integrity

Feel strong when facing temptations by discovering or restoring your values, beliefs, and passions.

 

Connection

Positively reinforce a commitment to change by cultivating healthy and meaningful relationships that support your goals.

 

Community

Create a lifestyle fit for long-term recovery by creating an environment where you feel seen, heard, and inspired.

 
 

 
 

 
 

 

 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

Your Care Team

 At Sandstone Care, we’ve built a team that’s as committed to your healing as you are. 

Each of our clinicians draw on their extensive experience in the addiction and mental health fields to provide the highest quality care. Every therapist, clinician, and staff member is committed to helping clients take their lives back from addiction or mental health struggles.

To date, our team has guided thousands of individuals down the road to lasting recovery.

 

 Meet our team 

Meet the leaders dedicated to our mission to relentlessly pursue successful clinical outcomes.

 

 Meet staff at our locations 

Browse our locations and find a team member at a specific facility.

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
In Network With Most Major Insurance

 Instantly Verify Insurance 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

Scholarship Opportunity

Support for Your Continued Commitment to Recovery

 Sandstone Care is offering a $5,000 college scholarship for individuals who are struggling or have struggled with substance use or mental health conditions.

Sandstone Care recognizes and appreciates the courage and bravery it takes for a young person to seek help. This is why it is our mission to overcome stigma and help support your future success in recovery. 

 Apply Now 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Careers

Be A Part Of Changing Lives For The Better

Join our team of passionate doctors, therapists, and specialists dedicated to improving the lives of teens and young adults.

 See all jobs 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 
As Seen in the Press

Our scientifically proven and evidence-based treatment process continues to earn national praise and foster relationships with the following:

 

 

 

 

 
 

iHeart Radio

Immanuel Jones shares his survival story from suicide attempt to suicide prevention tips, and helping young people cope with mental health issues.

 

 
 

Fox News

Erika Alhashmi LPC warns about the danger of teens self-diagnosing their mental health disorders on TikTok.

 

 
 

NBC

Peter King LCPC, explains how Sandstone Care provides age-specific, not gender-specific treatment for teens and adults in the LGBTQIA+ community.

 

 
 

CBS

Adrienne Washington LCPC, explains the negative impact of social media and provides tips for users and parents.

 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Additional Press & Recognition

 

 

 

 

 

 Self-Harm Awareness Day 

 

 How Did COVID Change Addiction Treatment? 

 

 14 Symptoms of Opioid Withdrawal—and What to Know About Breaking Your Addiction 

 

Sandstone Care Offers Hope for Troubled Teens

 
 

 
 

 
 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 

 

 
 

 

 

 
Get Treatment for Addiction and Mental Health Struggles

We’re committed to helping teens, young adults, and adults find hope and healing.

Call us today — we’re here to help in any way we can.

 

 
 Call (888) 850-1890 Verify Insurance 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 Verify Insurance (888) 850-1890
